context: Rules Cynthia uses to validate her own pre-opening expense receipts before reimbursing them from the Rootstock startup fund.

validation_rules.notes: Personal groceries are not reimbursable from the startup fund
validation_rules.requirement: Receipt must be tied to recipe testing or sourcing

validation_rules.notes: Only one valid receipt allowed per purchase
validation_rules.requirement: No duplicate uploads of the same receipt

validation_rules.notes: Match against the Harbor Savings checking statement
validation_rules.requirement: Reprinted receipts need a bank line to confirm

validation_rules.notes: Totals must be legible to post to the ledger
Submit within 30 days to keep the books current
validation_rules.requirement: Receipt is older than 30 days at submission
